name: Ultralytics YOLOv8
desc: Co-author of YOLOv8 and the Ultralytics Python framework (Jocher, Chaurasia, Qiu 2023) — the most-used object detection stack in the world.

name: YOLOv5
desc: Second-most-active human contributor — experiment tracking, classification support, fault-tolerant training, and the integrations ecosystem.

name: stable-worldmodel
desc: A platform for reproducible world-model research and evaluation, with a high-performance Lance-based data layer. Co-authored with Yann LeCun, Randall Balestriero, et al.

name: LanceDB
desc: The multimodal lakehouse — vector search and data infrastructure for AI. Early team; Python API, integrations, and the developer ecosystem.
